Experienced Python Developer with a strong background in the full Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile
methodologies. Proficient in requirement gathering, creating solution documents, and debugging/testing applications.
Skilled in backend development with Python, various databases, and cloud deployment using Pivotal Cloud Foundry. A
hardworking, result-oriented team player with excellent communication skills.

Experience
Python Developer Full-time

Flask and Django with MySQL/MongoDB backends.
•Managed projects using Agile and SDLC methodologies, participating in all stages from requirement gathering and
customer interaction to deployment.
•Acted as a Change Controller, responsible for promoting code changes through Development, UAT, and LIVE envi-

DB2/400, and SQL for the Movex/M3 ERP system.
•Created and supported solutions using M3 Java and Streamserve for complex ERP functionalities.
•Proficient in debugging and testing applications built with Python and on AS/400 platforms to ensure high-quality
deliverables.

Arabic : Native
English : Fluent

Ashraf Ibrahim is a Python RESTful API Developer with contact information including email (ashraf.ibrahim@email.com) and phone number (+20 101 234 5678), along with links to his GitHub and LinkedIn profiles.

Ashraf Ibrahim has experience in the full Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies, with skills in requirement gathering, solution documentation, and debugging/testing. He is proficient in Python, various databases, and cloud deployment using Pivotal Cloud Foundry.
Ashraf Ibrahim obtained an M.Sc. in Computer Science from Cairo University in 2011 with a CGPA of 3.86, and a B.Sc. in Computer Science from Cairo University in 2009.

From July 2011 to the present, Ashraf Ibrahim has worked as a Python Developer at Egy-Tech Solutions in Cairo, Egypt, developing and maintaining Python applications using Flask and Django with MySQL/MongoDB backends. He also managed projects using Agile and SDLC methodologies and acted as a Change Controller using Pivotal Cloud Foundry.

Ashraf Ibrahim has 7+ years of experience with IBM AS/400 systems, including development in RPG/RPGLE, CL, DB2/400, and SQL for the Movex/M3 ERP system, and has created solutions using M3 Java and Streamserve.

Ashraf Ibrahim holds several internal certificates in Python, Web Crawling, Web Scraping, Data Science, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Django, Angular 6, HTML, CSS, Core Java, M3 ERP (Java), IBM I series AS/400 Training, MOVEX ERP, and M3 Enterprise Collaborator (MEC). He also has a German A1 Level certification from Goethe-Institute.

Ashraf Ibrahim's skills include Python, Java, Flask, Django, SQL, RPG/400, CL/400, ILE RPG, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, DB2/400, Git, Pivotal Cloud Foundry, IBM AS/400, Movex/M3 ERP, Streamserve, Agile, SDLC, RESTful APIs, Requirement Gathering, and Debugging & Testing.
Ashraf Ibrahim is a native Arabic speaker, fluent in English, and has a basic level (A1) of German.

Ashraf Ibrahim is a Cairo-based Python RESTful API Developer with a decade of experience bridging modern web technologies with established enterprise systems. A graduate of Cairo University – holding both a B.Sc. (2009) and M.Sc. (2011, CGPA 3.86) in Computer Science – he’s been a dedicated Python Developer at Egy-Tech Solutions since 2011, skillfully crafting and maintaining applications using Flask and Django with MySQL and MongoDB backends. 

He’s a pragmatic engineer, comfortable navigating the full Software Development Life Cycle and embracing Agile methodologies for project management. Beyond the core web stack, Ashraf possesses a remarkable depth of knowledge in IBM AS/400 systems, honed over seven years, with expertise in RPG/RPGLE, CL, DB2/400, and SQL within the Movex/M3 ERP environment. He’s extended this expertise into modern solutions using M3 Java and Streamserve.

A committed lifelong learner, Ashraf boasts an impressive collection of certifications spanning Python, web technologies (including Angular 6, HTML, and CSS), data science, and various database systems. He’s also a certified Change Controller utilizing Pivotal Cloud Foundry. Fluent in both Arabic and English, with a foundational grasp of German (A1 level), Ashraf is readily accessible via email (ashraf.ibrahim@email.com), phone (+20 101 234 5678), and professional profiles on GitHub and LinkedIn.
